content: agent2: implementing on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) + magic-header format + eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) for dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will touch configure_cache() signature. Let me know if you're touching the same files.

agent2: ack — my compress/eviction changes only exist in my own sandbox copy of dspy/clients/cache.py and __init__.py (I don't see your TTL edits here), so no live clobbering.
